Subject: Cloudbeds: An update on your application
Body:
Hi Dennis,

Thank you for applying for the Engineering Manager - Revenue Intelligence role. We genuinely appreciate the time you invested in your application. After carefully reviewing your background, we've decided to move forward with candidates whose experience aligns more directly to what this specific role needs.

We're growing fast, and new roles open up regularly. When you see something that feels like a better match, we genuinely want to hear from you again. Keep an eye on Cloudbeds Careers <https://www.cloudbeds.com/careers/> and follow our LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/cloudbeds/>   page to stay informed about future opportunities.

Thank you again for considering Cloudbeds. We're wishing you the best in your search.

Best Regards,

The Talent Acquisition Team @ Cloudbeds

Please note: per company policy, we are unable to provide individual application feedback to candidates at this stage in the process.

Hi Dennis,




Thank you so much for your interest in Wealth Dynamix and for taking the time to apply for the Senior Technical Project Manager - SDLC - Fintech position. We just wanted to let you know that we received your application, and that we're looking forward to reviewing it.




If your cv is selected for the next round, we will be in touch soon.




Have a great day!




Assem Abbas

Head of Talent




Please review our privacy policy here: https://wealth-dynamix.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Wealth-Dynamix-Privacy-Notice.pdf
